title: WORLD RACING WEEKLY: Ancient Egypt, David Egan & Behrayna
description: You have to go back 81 years to find the last time a horse trained in northern England won the Derby but Ancient Egypt will attempt to end the long wait.

title: Humans had dogs before they had farming, ancient DNA confirms
description: By roughly 14,000 years ago, hunter-gatherer societies across Europe had discovered dogs, scientists reported in two new papers.

title: Wuhu takes off: Where ancient craft meets the future of industry

title: Garuda Vyuha: Rama’s Formation Warfare and the Ancient Logic of Modern Battle Design
description: Formation warfare is one of the oldest signs of organised military thought. A formation transforms individual fighters into a coordinated body. It gives an army shape, rhythm and direction. It helps commanders place strong fighters at decisive points, protect vulnerable elements, hold reserves, manage movement and apply pressure in a disciplined way. Rama’s Garuda formation shows that the Vanara army had moved from raw strength into structured combat power. The post Garuda Vyuha: Rama’s Formation Warfare and the Ancient Logic of Modern Battle Design appeared first on Dharmakshethra - India Unabridged .

title: Gigantic scorpions with formidable pincers once roamed England and Wales, fossil reveals
description: Species emerged at a time well before the evolution of trees and lived a semi-aquatic life, scientists say
